title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Periodontal Disease
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils contains active constituents like gingerol and shogaol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain associated with periodontal disease. The essential oils also contain antioxidants like gingerols and shogaols, which protect the gums from damage caused by free radicals.
